chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-551 of 2009 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.09.2019. Mr. Sunderdas, advocate for intervener Mr. Ahsan Zahoor Baloch, advocate. Mr. Roshan Ali Azeem Mallah, advocate holds brief for Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro, advocate for respondents No.13 to 16. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. = None is present for the petitioners nor any intimation has been received. Perusal of file reflects that on 20.01.2015 none was present for the petitioners and on 11.05.2016 learned counsel for the petitioners was present but he requested for further time to comply with the order dated 20.01.2015. Deliberate absence on part of petitioners shows that perhaps they have lost interest in the matter, therefore instant petition is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
